examples: She was then hooked up to an IV drip.
He was put on intravenous drip to treat his dehydration.
The silence was broken only by the steady drip, drip of water from the roof.
It has been quite a few years since any self-respecting coffee snob took auto-drip seriously.
She was hooked to a monitor and had an intravenous drip in her left arm.
